projects.title: One Community Church Website
projects.blurb: A polished, responsive website built to connect a local church with its community. Showcases sermons, events, and resources with a clean interface.

projects.title: My Portfolio Website
projects.blurb: My personal online hub, showcasing work, projects, and teaching resources. Combines professional design with interactive elements for a modern portfolio experience.

projects.title: Everett Seizure Free Tracker
projects.blurb: A practical app for tracking seizure-free days, empowering users to monitor progress and patterns over time.

projects.title: Bible Reading Plans
projects.blurb: Helps readers stay consistent with daily Scripture reading by generating easy-to-follow plans.

projects.title: Aleph Bible Dictionary
projects.blurb: A digital reference tool for exploring Hebrew words and their biblical meanings. Makes studying Scripture faster and more interactive.

projects.title: Quench and Gulp
projects.blurb: A fun hydration tracker app that encourages users to drink water regularly. Simple design, intuitive interface.

projects.title: QR Code Studio
projects.blurb: Create and manage custom QR codes easily for any purpose. Clean UI and practical functionality.

projects.title: Reeeader Book Tracking App
projects.blurb: Track books, reading progress, and personal notes with this user-friendly book logging app.

projects.title: Task-Man To-Do
projects.blurb: A classic to-do app with a modern twist. Keep tasks organized and stay productive.

projects.title: Fashion-Man Weather
projects.blurb: Combines weather updates with style suggestions. Helps users plan their outfits with real-time data.

projects.title: Timer Studio
projects.blurb: Multi-purpose timer for workouts, focus sessions, or cooking. Sleek, interactive interface with real-time updates.

projects.title: Movie Database Search
projects.blurb: Search and explore movies using an interactive database. Practice in API integration and dynamic search functionality.

projects.title: GameDay | Sports Dashboard
projects.blurb: A real-time sports dashboard showing team stats, scores, and updates. Engaging and interactive data presentation.

projects.title: Tic-Tac-Toe
projects.blurb: A classic game brought to the web with a modern design twist. Fun, responsive, and perfect for quick gameplay.

projects.title: Bible-Games Trivia
projects.blurb: Challenge your knowledge of Scripture with this interactive trivia game. Entertaining and educational at the same time.

projects.title: Command Line Mortgage Calculator
projects.blurb: A simple Java program that calculates mortgage payments. Great exercise in logic, arithmetic, and console-based applications.

projects.title: 100 Days of Java Practice
projects.blurb: A curated collection of Java exercises for skill-building and mastery over the course of 100 days.
